description: Emergency Demolition to an 11' x 15' attached accessory structure (165 sf) to an existing grocery. The roof of the small structure has caved in as shown in enclosed photos. This is a potential hazard to public safety because the attached structure is on the property line adjacent to the sidewalk as highlighted in the enclosed survey. The owner wishes to remove the 11' x 15' structure as soon as possible to stop the potential threat to public safety and to stop potential water damage to the main building. The attached structure is not part of the grocery store operations and not needed for the building use. The main building has its original brick exterior intact so removal of the attached structure will not remove the exterior of the main building.

description: Renovation of an existing 21 room hotel into a six suite hotel with a total of 18 bedrooms. Work will include reconstruction of over 50% of the hotel building but will not include expanding the hotel's footprint or overall area. The work will include installing a 13r compliant sprinkler system, new electrical, a fire alarm system, new HVAC, and rearrangement of interior walls with ADAAG upgrades. Where possible, bathroom fixtures on the ground floor are located where existing fixtures are located. PERMIT WITHDRAWN - REFER TO 21-25922-RNVS

description: The interior support bean at the base of the pediment on the Jackson Avenue facade is showing signs of decay and needs to be secured. The facade will be repaired with no changes made to the architectural design.

Completion of an existing structure permitted under CNO Permit #17-06916-NEWC for occupancy of an orphanage. The building occupancy has been changed to "Educational - Primary/Secondary" under Conditional Use approved Ordinance No. 28433. The project also includes interior renovations and additions to the original permitted project including a porch, exterior ramps and an exterior exit stair from the second level, as well as associated site, utility and stormwater management and drainage work.
